untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pattern recognition analysis (identifying chart pattern height and width dimensions) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, ATR, Bollinger Bands, etc.). The core rule depends on classifying visual pattern proportions (tall/short, narrow/wide) against breakout/breakdown performance statistics. No combination of technical indicators can replicate this pattern morphology classification without explicit pattern detection logic.
translation_notes: Signal BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 is a meta-analysis rule documenting Bulkowski's research on how chart pattern dimensions correlate with breakout success rates. It requires: (1) visual pattern identification and measurement, (2) height/width ratio classification, (3) direction-specific performance lookup. The performance statistics (tall patterns: +35% breakout vs -18% breakdown; short patterns: +23% breakout vs -13% breakdown) are research findings, not tradeable rules. To implement, external pattern detection library or manual chart analysis would be required before indicator-based entry/exit conditions could be applied.
